name: Mini Mushroom-Feta Turnovers
recipeIngredient: 3/4 teaspoon fresh thyme or 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Prepare a large baking sheet.
2. Filling: Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add shallot and sauté 2-3 minutes until soft. Add mushrooms and sauté 2-3 minutes until mushrooms are soft. Add tomato, thyme, salt, and pepper; sauté another minute. Remove from heat and let cool for about 5 minutes. Stir in feta cheese.
3. Unfold puff pastry on a lightly floured surface. Roll into a 12-inch square. Cut the pastry into thirty-six 2-inch squares. Place half a teaspoon of mushroom mixture in the center of each square, leaving a 1/2-inch border all around. Moisten the edges with water. Fold each square diagonally to form triangles. Seal the filling by pressing the edges with the tines of a fork.
4. Brush the tops lightly with egg wash. Transfer pastries to the prepared baking sheet.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown. Serve warm or at room temperature.
